Andishi is an African engineering talent company that places senior, vetted
software engineers with global startups and technology companies. Engineers are
sourced across Africa and carry production experience in full-stack web
development, AI/ML integrations, AWS and cloud infrastructure, Web3 and
blockchain, backend API systems, and mobile development.

Andishi also operates a product studio arm that designs and ships digital
products for African businesses. Each project doubles as a proof-of-work
portfolio for the engineers Andishi places.

Clients include seed-stage to Series B startups in the US, UK, EU, and GCC who
need to extend engineering teams quickly, launch MVPs, or scale existing
products. Andishi handles sourcing, vetting, onboarding, and ongoing performance
management.

Key pages: /, /services, /work, /about, /contact.

Services: Contract and fractional engineers, team extension, dedicated build
teams, full-stack engineering, AI integration, Cloud/AWS infrastructure, Web3 and
blockchain, Data Engineers, backend API systems, and mobile engineering.
